name: Clay
description: Soft, pillowy, pastel visual language. Rounded forms, inner highlights, squishy interactions, and gentle animations. All standard Decantr components work — this recipe describes how to COMPOSE them for the clay aesthetic.

decorators.cy-pillow: Pillow shadow + inner white highlight. Apply to cards, panels, and elevated elements.
decorators.cy-pillow-strong: Stronger pillow variant for hero elements and featured items.
decorators.cy-squish: Tactile scale-down-on-press effect. Apply to buttons and interactive cards.
decorators.cy-float: Gentle vertical floating bob (5s). Apply to decorative elements and icons.
decorators.cy-blob: Absolute-positioned blurred pastel blob. Use for decorative background elements.
decorators.cy-soft: Ultra-soft shadow with no border. For subtle elevation without pillow effect.
decorators.cy-dimple: Inset shadow for recessed surfaces. Apply to inputs, status bars, and wells.
decorators.cy-bounce: Elastic bounce-in entrance animation. Apply to elements entering view.
decorators.cy-jelly: Jelly wobble on hover. Apply to interactive cards and playful elements.
decorators.cy-pastel-mesh: Radial gradient background with violet/cyan/pink pastel layers.
decorators.cy-label: Rounded pill label with pastel background. For section headers and tags.
decorators.cy-swatch: Color swatch with pillow shadow and hover lift. For color specimens.
decorators.cy-glow: Soft pastel glow shadow. For primary CTAs and highlighted elements.
decorators.cy-pulse-soft: Gentle shadow pulse animation (4s). For featured or active states.

panel.description: Standard clay panel. Pillow shadow with inner highlight and label header.

card.description: Clay card. Standard Card with pillow shadow, jelly hover, and squish press.

kpi.description: Clay KPI metric with pillow shadow and bold value.

sidebar.description: Clay navigation sidebar with pillow panels and label section headers.

specimen.description: Color specimen card with swatch preview and pillow shadow.
specimen.example:
Card({ class: css('cy-pillow cy-squish') },
  div({ class: css('cy-swatch _h20 _r4'), style: `background:${color}` }),
  Card.Body({ class: css('_flex _col _gap1') },
    span({ class: css('_textsm _bold') }, name),
    code({ class: css('_textxs _fgmuted _fontmono') }, hex)
  )
)

workspace.description: Creative workspace with dimple input area and pillow output grid.
